description_long: This is a vintage-style record player with a rectangular wooden case and a hinged lid that opens upward. The main body features a large, circular black turntable platter on the left, with a straight, light-colored tonearm resting on the right side. There are two round control knobs and a rectangular switch or button area near the tonearm, all in a light gray color. The front panel is black, possibly housing speakers or a display, and the wood grain texture is visible on the exterior surfaces. The lid is lined with a similar wood finish and is propped open, revealing the entire playing mechanism. The overall design is classic and functional, suitable for home or urban lounge environments.
description: A classic wooden record player with a black platter, light gray tonearm, and control knobs, housed in a rectangular case with a hinged lid. The front panel is black, contrasting with the warm wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, black platter, tonearm, and two control knobs on the right.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the case, the tonearm, and the control knobs.
description_view_2: Close-up of the front panel, mostly showing the black face and wood texture, with minimal detail of the controls.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full platter, tonearm, and both control knobs clearly, with the open lid visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present and prominently visible, the turntable platter is large, circular, and black, occupying the left side of the player. It appears to be made of plastic or rubber with a matte finish and no visible grooves or markings. The platter is slightly raised above the main surface and is proportionally about one-third the width of the entire player.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, straight, and light gray in color, positioned on the right side of the platter. It appears to be made of plastic or metal, with a matte finish, and is resting in its holder rather than over the platter. The tonearm is of medium length and has a visible pivot joint.
attribute_control_knobs: Two round control knobs are present, both light gray and located on the right side of the player near the tonearm. They are medium-sized, cylindrical, and made of plastic. No visible labels or markings are apparent from the images.
attribute_dust_cover: A dust cover is present, made of the same wood material as the case, and is currently open, hinged at the back. It is opaque, matching the exterior finish, and does not appear to have a handle or transparent window.
